mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order (product_id, line_id, quantity, status, priority, planning_time, creator_id, remarks, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{lineId}, #{quantity}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{planningTime}, #{creatorId}, #{remarks}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT work_order.id, work_order.product_id, product.name as productName, work_order.line_id, line.name as lineName, work_order.quantity, work_order.status, work_order.priority, work_order.planning_time, work_order.creator_id, sys_user.name as creatorName, work_order.remarks, work_order.create_time, work_order.update_time FROM work_order LEFT JOIN product ON work_order.product_id = product.id LEFT JOIN line ON work_order.line_id = line.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ON work_order.creator_id = sys_user.id WHERE work_order.id = #{id}

SELECT work_order.id, work_order.product_id, product.name as productName, work_order.line_id, line.name as lineName, work_order.quantity, work_order.status, work_order.priority, work_order.planning_time, work_order.creator_id, sys_user.name as creatorName, work_order.remarks, work_order.create_time, work_order.update_time FROM work_order LEFT JOIN product ON work_order.product_id = product.id LEFT JOIN line ON work_order.line_id = line.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ON work_order.creator_id = sys_user.id ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE work_order
product_id = #{productId},
line_id = #{lineId},
quantity = #{quantity},
status = #{status},
priority = #{priority},
planning_time = #{planningTime},
creator_id = #{creatorId},
remarks = #{remarks},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM work_order WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_process (order_id, process_seq, qualified_quantity, bad_quantity, operator_id, remarks, start_time, finish_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{processSeq}, #{qualifiedQuantity}, #{badQuantity}, #{operatorId}, #{remarks}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, process_seq, # status, qualified_quantity, bad_quantity, operator_id, remarks, start_time, finish_time, create_time, update_time FROM work_process WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT id, order_id, process_seq, # status, qualified_quantity, bad_quantity, operator_id, remarks, start_time, finish_time, create_time, update_time FROM work_process ORDER BY create_time DESC
